Monsters (C)
Chronal Hydra
Huge monstrosity, neutral evil
Armor Class 18 (natural armor)
Hit Points 250 (20d12 + 120)
Speed 30 ft., swim 30 ft.
STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA
23 (+6) 12 (+1) 22 (+6) 5 (-3) 12 (+1) 8 (-1)
Saving Throws Con +11, Wis +6
Skills Perception +6
Senses darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 16
Languages --
Challenge 15 (13,000 XP)
Temporal Heads. The hydra has five heads.
Reactive Carapace. The hydra can take one extra reaction each round, but only to make opportunity attacks.
Actions
Multiattack. The hydra makes as many Temporal Bite attacks as it has heads.
Temporal Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) force damage.
Time Pulse (Recharge 5-6). Each creature within 20 feet of the hydra must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Reactions
Counter Lash. When a creature within 10 feet of the hydra hits it with an attack, the hydra makes one Temporal Bite attack against that creature.
Legendary Actions
The hydra can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time.
Detect. The hydra makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
Snap (Costs 2 Actions). The hydra makes one Temporal Bite attack.
Rift Burst (Costs 3 Actions). Each creature within 10 feet of the hydra must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or take 10 (3d6) force damage.
Lair Actions
On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the hydra can take one lair action:
Gravitic Surge. Each creature of the hydra's choice within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Temporal Fog. Until initiative count 20 on the next round, the area within 60 feet is heavily obscured.
Appendix PH-A:
